page_content:
GVPT635 Public Opinion (3 Credits)

Investigate how citizens in a democracy think about politics, form attitudes, and how public opinion shapes and is shaped by the political environment. While being exposed to core debates in public opinion and the study of public opinion, students will use a number of surveys that have been central to advancing our knowledge of public opinion. Restriction: Must be in the Applied Political Analytics Master of Science program; or permission of department.
